title: Apple Penne Nee Yaaro Lyrics Roja Koottam
stanzas:
Apple Penne Nee Yaaro Lyrics Roja Koottam
Singer: Srinivas
Music: Bharadwaj
Lyrics: Palani Bharathy

apple penne nee yaaro
ice cream silaye nee yaaro
kannil thondri marayum
kaanal neero.

poovin magale nee yaaro
punnagai nilave nee yaaro
paadhik kanavil marayum
paravai yaaro..

enai nee paarka villai
en uyir nondhadhadi
penne nee pona vazhiyil
en uyir ponadhadi

apple penne nee yaaro
ice cream silaye nee yaaro
kannil thondri marayum
kaanal neero.

penne unnai marumurai
paarthaal love you
love you solvaayaa

angeye nindru kondu
en uyir thembudhadi
apple penne nee yaaro
ice cream silaye nee yaaro
kannil thondri marayum
kaanal neero.

poovin magale nee yaaro
punnagai nilave nee yaaro
paadhik kanavil marayum
paravai yaaro..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and admiration, using vivid imagery to convey emotions.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Roja Koottam, this song highlights a romantic moment between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Srinivas and composed by Bharadwaj.

When was the song released?

Apple Penne Nee Yaaro was released on February 14, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Apple Penne Nee Yaaro, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, using beautiful metaphors and imagery. The song's romantic theme is perfectly complemented by Srinivas's soulful voice and Bharadwaj's captivating music. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The lyrics beautifully encapsulate the essence of love, making it a memorable piece in the Tamil music landscape.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Apple Penne Nee Yaaro from Roja Koottam is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung beautifully by Srinivas, the song showcases the enchanting music of Bharadwaj, making it a timeless classic. Dive into the lyrical beauty crafted by Palani Bharathi that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: Who are you, my apple girl? Who are you, my ice cream girl? The water that flows in my eyes is hidden in my sight.
Who are you, daughter of the flower? Who are you, the smiling moon? The bird that hides in my dreams is you.
You don't look at me, my dear. My life is lost in the way you left.
In this place, my happiness has disappeared.
Standing there, my life is burning away.
When I see lightning, I close my eyes, but I can't see anything.
Holding the sound of lightning in my hands, oh no, there is no joy.
Looking at me, the raindrop of the evening has fallen somewhere, I don't know where.
Which sculptor has made this? Until now, there is no information.
I won't let go of the water without seeing your beauty.
If the other side of the sky comes, I won't let it go either.
Even if God comes before me, I won't worship God.
In this place, my happiness has disappeared.
Standing there, my life is burning away.
Who are you, my apple girl? Who are you, my ice cream girl? The water that flows in my eyes is hidden in my sight.
If you see me, will you say 'I love you, I love you'?
Oh poor thing, will you be taken away for being crazy?
Even if you are in the world's sorrow, I will come there, do you understand?
If life is given back, will you say 'okay'?
If you say 'yes', I will give a hundred lives.
If you say 'no', I will take my life at the end of your words.
I was born in another place, but I will love again.
In this place, my happiness has disappeared.
Standing there, my life is burning away. Who are you, my apple girl? Who are you, my ice cream girl? The water that flows in my eyes is hidden in my sight.
Who are you, daughter of the flower? Who are you, the smiling moon? The bird that hides in my dreams is you.
